title: fastqc
description: FastQC - A high throughput sequence QC analysis tool.

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.description: At least one of the output options (--html, --zip, --summary, --data) must be used.

outdir.description: Output directory where the results will be saved.

html.description: Create the HTML report of the results

zip.description:
Create the zip file(s) containing: html report, data, images, icons, summary, etc.
'*' wild card must be provided in the output file name.
Wild card will be replaced by the input basename.
e.g

summary.description:
Create the summary file(s).
'*' wild card must be provided in the output file name.
Wild card will be replaced by the input basename.
e.g

data.description:
Create the data file(s).
'*' wild card must be provided in the output file name.
Wild card will be replaced by the input basename.
e.g

casava.description: Files come from raw casava output

nano.description: Files come from nanopore sequences and are in fast5 format

nofilter.description:
If running with --casava then don't remove read flagged by
casava as poor quality when performing the QC analysis.

nogroup.description: Disable grouping of bases for reads >50bp

min_length.description:
Sets an artificial lower limit on the length of the 
sequence to be shown in the report

format.description:
Bypasses the normal sequence file format detection and 
forces the program to use the specified format

contaminants.description:
Specifies a non-default file which contains the list 
of contaminants to screen overrepresented sequences against

adapters.description:
Specifies a non-default file which contains the list of 
adapter sequences which will be explicitly searched against 
the library

limits.description:
Specifies a non-default file which contains 
a set of criteria which will be used to determine 
the warn/error limits for the various modules

kmers.description:
Specifies the length of Kmer to look for in the Kmer 
content module

quiet.description: Suppress all progress messages on stdout and only report errors.

nextflow input-output arguments.title: Nextflow input-output arguments
nextflow input-output arguments.description: Input/output parameters for Nextflow itself. Please note that both publishDir and publish_dir are supported but at least one has to be configured.
